[[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]][[de:Wasser-Affe]][[fr:Singe d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]][[ja:壬申]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Aap]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Nyaemzsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]
[[Category:qq]]

{{中華圏の事物
|タイトル = 壬申
|File種別 = 
|File = 
|Fileの説明 = 
|繁体字 = 壬申
|簡体字 = 壬申
|ピン音 = rénshēn
|通用ピン音 = 
|注音符号 = ㄖㄣˊㄕㄣ
|ラテン字 = 
|カタカナ = レンシェーン
|漢音読み = じんしん
|慣用読み = みずのえさる<br>じんすいのさる
|ひらがな = 
|韓国語 = 임신 
|ベトナム語 = Nhâm Thân
}}
'''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 9th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Metal Goat]] and followed by [[Yin Water Rooster]]. In the context of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]]) (i.e. Metal generates Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Monkey (壬申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san1
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: jinshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imsinn (임신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thân

==Years of Yang Water Monkey==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 12 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Water Monkey]].

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Monkey (壬申)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 12|12 AD]]
* [[AD 72|72 AD]]
* [[AD 132|132 AD]]
* [[192|192 AD]]
* [[252|252 AD]]
* [[312|312 AD]]
* [[372|372 AD]]
* [[432|432 AD]]
* [[492|492 AD]]
* [[552|552 AD]]
* [[612|612 AD]]
* [[672|672 AD]]
* [[732|732 AD]]
* [[792|792 AD]]
* [[852|852 AD]]
* [[912|912 AD]]
* [[972|972 AD]]
|
* [[1032|1032 AD]]
* [[1092|1092 AD]]
* [[1152|1152 AD]]
* [[1212|1212 AD]]
* [[1272|1272 AD]]
* [[1332|1332 AD]]
* [[1392|1392 AD]]
* [[1452|1452 AD]]
* [[1512|1512 AD]]
* [[1572|1572 AD]]
* [[1632|1632 AD]]
* [[1692|1692 AD]]
* [[1752|1752 AD]]
* [[1812|1812 AD]]
* [[1872|1872 AD]]
* [[1932|1932 AD]]
* [[1992|1992 AD]]
|
* [[2052 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2112 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2172 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2232 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2292 AD]]
* [[2352 AD]]
* [[2412 AD]]
* [[2472 AD]]
* [[2532 AD]]
* [[2592 AD]]
* [[2652 AD]]
* [[2712 AD]]
* [[2772 AD]]
* [[2832 AD]]
* [[2892 AD]]
* [[2952 AD]]
|}

===Events===
* [[Emperor Tenji]] 11th year ([[672|672 AD]]) – [[Jinshin War|Renjin Rebellion]].
* In [[Meiji era]] 5 ([[1872|1872 AD]]), the family register compiled at that time was called the [[jinshin koseki]].

==Months of Yang Water Monkey==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[July]] is designated as the [[Month]] of [[Yang Water Monkey]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Monkey==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yang Water Monkey]] is as follows.

==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of [[Yang Water Monkey]] is the 3rd day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Large Earth]].

==Yang Water Monkey (壬申時==
It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00.

==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q1062030}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Qqqqqqqqq]]
